creator: luke@tonnochi.net
text:
Chris,

I also experienced the same error when trying to build jellyfin from ports however I was able to complete compilation by simply issuing the below command which seems to satisfy the build requirements.

root@jellyfin-jail:# touch /usr/ports/multimedia/jellyfin/work/stage/usr/local/jellyfin/jellyfin-web/32947.1d95d64c35f97caac382.chunk.js

Now this may not be the correct way and I'm no port maintainer however I just thought it was interesting that this worked and I am now able to view my media on jellyfin in a browser without issues.
